text_block_list.text:
With the opening address concluded, the Fan
Fest begins in earnest. Symboli Rudolf's big
moment will be the exhibition race at the end of
the event.

Despite technically being a ceremonial race, it's
certain to be competitive. If possible, I'd like her
to spend the morning resting up, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, in short, the carrot-picking event is struggling
for attendees?

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It looks like the scavenger hunt
behind it is getting all of the attention.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That won't be very encouraging for the students
running it. What other large events are on at the
moment?

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Um... well, there's the cosplay race. It's out on the
school track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's relatively close by. We can try funneling
attendees to the carrot picking event from there.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let's extend the time we have posted for it as
well. I'll give Team G permission to make the
changes.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text: Roger that, President! I'll do that right away!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.
choice_data_list: Seems like you've got a lot on your plate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. I should know better than to sigh like
that in public.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I should not be making you look after me,
either. Go on, look around. Explore.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The students have put their all into making this
festival as good as it can be. I want as many
people as possible to enjoy themselves.

Much as I'd love to enjoy the festival, it's hard not
to worry when she looks so tired.

Not that it's much of a surprise. The combination
of training, student council duties, and planning
the festival has been running her ragged.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah, President. Here you are.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I sent a you request for additional resources a
little while ago, but I never received a reply.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry, it slipped my mind. Your
request is approved. You may go ahead.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well. If you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you. And sorry for the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What a blunder. I hardly deserve to call myself
president...
choice_data_list: Are you sure you're not just tired?
Are you sure you're not just tired?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps so, but the failure is still mine. If I cannot
look after my own well-being, what good am I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, I must pull myself together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The spectators at the exhibition race are
expecting to see me at full strength.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A great number of students will filter in after the
other races finish as well. I have to show them a
performance worthy of the Emperor.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you're going to be all right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. Never fear. I'm always all right, am I not?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, go ahead and enjoy the Fan Fest. I need to
return to the student council office to receive
some more reports.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The event continues smoothly thanks to the
efforts of the student council, but I can't quite
shake a lingering sense of unease.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the event you've all been
waiting for: the Tracen Academy exhibition race!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Needless to say, all eyes are on the Emperor,
Symboli Rudolf! How will she rule the track
today? The crowd is buzzing with anticipation!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Go Rudooolf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd is more curious about how Symboli Rudolf will win, rather than whether she'll win... but that's not how things pan out.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And we're coming into the final stretch... but it
looks like Symboli Rudolf is having some trouble!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
There's someone coming up on the outside, but
it's not Symboli Rudolf! It's—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
What the heck was that? Isn't she supposed to be
the Emperor?

text_block_list.name: Spectating Student
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen the President run so slow... What
happened?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Symboli Rudolf never manages to
separate herself from the pack. It's a
disappointing performance for the Emperor, and
the crowd knows it.
